'''Kissarm''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core's]] [[Beshqek system]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by nine [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and occupied the sixth orbital position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Beshqek]].<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kissarm was first mentioned in "[[Byss and the Deep Core]], Part 1: Byss," the first entry in the [[Planet Hoppers]] ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'' article series, written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[April 14]], [[2005]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed Kissarm in grid square K-11.<ref name="TEA" />
